source_quotes: Hostellers are generally not permitted to leave the campus except on holidays and require prior written permission from their Head of Department (HOD) and the hostel warden.
Hostellers are generally not permitted to leave the campus except on holidays and require prior written permission from their Head of Department (HOD) and the hostel warden.
For outstation travel or going home, written permission from the warden or superintendent is mandatory.
Student Council: Comprises President, Secretary, and Department Coordinators.

Headed by the Principal with dedicated squads.
